title: Cuneiform Tablet #0265: Old Akkadian Mathematical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Mathematical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records mathematical matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
